J2800_GENITOURINARY_SRGRY_IND J2800 Genitourinary Surgery - Male or Female Organs CHAR 1 Involving male or female organs (such as prostate, testes, ovaries, uterus, vagina, external genitalia).
791 J2810_KDNY_SRGRY_IND J2810_KDNY_SRGRY_IND J2810 Genitourinary Surgery - Kidneys CHAR 1 Involving the kidneys, ureters, adrenal glands, or bladder - open or laparoscopic (includes creation or removal of nephrostomies or urostomies).
792 J2899_GENITOURINARY_OTHR_IND J2899_GENITOURINARY_OTHR_IND J2899
